text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day as summer camp is winding down...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Flaaash! ☆ There you are!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon, Eishin Flash's roommate and
self-proclaimed Umadol, runs up to us cheerfully.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You were searching for me? Did you need me for
something?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I set aside twenty-five milliliters of tail
conditioner for you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks a bunch! ☆ Now my tail'll be silky smooth!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I believe I reminded you to check your baggage on two separate occasions before we departed for camp.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah, but I just knew you'd bring extra,
sooo... ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Actually, we could just shower together. It's
pretty late already.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I can't. I have yet to complete my training. There
are still fifteen... no, twenty minutes including
transit time before I'm done.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Aw, come on! Who cares about skipping twenty
minutes of practice?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Falcon. Skipping five minutes of practice is still
within acceptability, but skipping twenty minutes
is highly irresponsible and—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There you go again with your fancy-schmancy
words and stuff!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe I have said anything particularly
"fancy-schmancy"...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash isn't usually so emotive. She must be
comfortable enough with Smart Falcon to let her
guard down.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's head back, Trainer. I'd like to receive your
feedback for today's session and verify the
details of tomorrow's schedule.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I can't believe you're still going on about
that stuff! Just do it tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash is getting stronger by the day, but I
think she'll need to approach things from a new
angle if she wants to get stronger still.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been going all-out from the day camp
started, but if there's one way to get her to
relax...
choice_data_list: Can I ask you a few questions, Smart Falcon?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Sure. About what?
choice_data_list: How do you hold out during races?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes a lot of power to run on dirt tracks, which
is where Smart Falcon thrives. I ask her to give us
some pointers.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I could learn much from you about
strength, Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Your dancing is forceful enough to bring things
tumbling down in the dorm room, after all.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Was that supposed to be a compliment? Anyway,
let's see... My strength, huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, I've got it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yuuum! ♪ That cotton candy was delish! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So what's next? Toffee? Candied apples?
Everything's sooo cute! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me. I thought you were going to tell us
your technique for building strength.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So why are we at a summer festival perusing all
the desserts from the street stalls?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Chowing down on sweet stuff is the best way to
recharge yourself! ☆ It's my tried-and-true secret
to gaining power! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Does it?
choice_data_list: Just give it a try and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
How am I supposed to "give it a try and have fun"
when there's no way to validate Falcon's claims?
For starters—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, no more fancy-schmancy words or logic
from you! ☆ C'mon and let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash is skeptical at first, but she does
seem to look more refreshed and energetic in the
end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon is an incredible front runner, and
I've always wondered how she manages to stay
ahead of the pack in her races.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... I could learn much from you about
tenacity, Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You even extend the riverside concerts you hold
by an extra song when you notice a new audience
member join the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! ☆ That's something my fans always give
me brownie points for!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you really wanna know how I'm able to
work so hard, it's...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: L-O-V-E! Love ☆ Falco! Lemme hear it!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Love ☆ Falco!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Incredible. Falcon has been dancing continuously
for over an hour...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I love you all, my fans! ☆ As long as you have
your eyes on me, I can go on forever!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And today's fan of the day is... Flash!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I was so touched that you knew about the
concerts I hold by the river! Thanks for looking
out for me all the time!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now let me channel all my feelings of gratitude
into this next song! ☆ Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Feelings and emotions... They're such ambiguous
things, but somehow she manages to convey them
so clearly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: She really is amazing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash says this last part softly, but it's
impossible to miss the fondness in her words.
